mapper.sql: id, dept_id, category_code, category_name, description, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM work_category
AND dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = 1
ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_category (dept_id, category_code, category_name, description, status) VALUES (#{deptId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{status})
